pullRequest.title: QE-14941 Restore AI Hub tests, with CircleCI workflow

nodes.body:
two issues
1. the `when` condition of `pre-merge` needs to be updated to exclude your new workflow
2. this `pre-merge-system` worflow needs to be split into the specific workflows `pre-merge-system-standard` and `pre-merge-system-ai-hub`
probably should also make a `system-ai-hub-vcluster` to be consistent
was this part of debugging code that didn't get reverted?
I think we should keep it. It makes setup idempotent, where without it, setup fails if you run it twice on the same deployment.
